title: Air travel faces unprecedented crisis as flights are canceled and ticket prices rise
subhead: Amid rising ticket prices, flight cancellations and fears of a kerosene shortage, commercial aviation has been weathering a storm that has weakened airlines, with some proving especially vulnerable.

Emmanuel Macron and Abiy Ahmed: A privileged relationship in spite of war and massacres in Tigray
subhead: For the final stop of his African tour, the French president chose Ethiopia. The visit gave him another opportunity to publicly support Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed, whose actions in the Tigray region – which was the scene of a deadly war between 2020 and 2022 – have drawn criticism.

title: Is there a vaccine or cure for hantavirus?
subhead: Vaccine and drug candidates are currently under development, but this family of viruses had never been considered a public health priority until the outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship.

title: Obesity surges in low-income countries, stabilizes in wealthier nations
subhead: A major study on global obesity trends, published Wednesday in Nature, reveals diverging trajectories depending on a country's income level. Obesity, however, has reached alarming heights worldwide, affecting one in eight people.

title: Massoumeh Lahidji, the polyglot watching over the Cannes Film Festival
subhead: The Iranian interpreter, a pillar of the festival, translates without notes and collaborates with numerous filmmakers.

'Zinédine Zidane maintains a political and social awareness that is deeply connected to his own story'
subhead: The sociologist Stéphane Beaud explored in an essay the football player's career, framing it within that of the descendants of Algerian immigrants. In an interview, he explains that the athlete tried to make up for the injustices suffered by his father, who remained at the bottom of the social ladder throughout his life.

title: Wine consumption continues to decline around the world
subhead: Wine consumption fell by 2.7% year-on-year, according to data released on Tuesday by the International Organization of Vine and Wine. But France remains the world's leading wine exporter by value.

title: October 7: New report documents extent of sexual violence committed by Hamas
subhead: The most comprehensive report to date on October 7, with 400 witnesses and experts, finds that Hamas has 'deliberately and systematically resorted to sexual and gender-based violence.'
